## ⛔ Manual Edits to Auto-Generated Files Detected

The following generated file (`DO NOT EDIT`) was modified by a non-automation commit:

- `sdk/resourcemanager/compute/armcompute/virtualmachinescalesetvmextensions_client.go` — changed in commit `734fd95` by `@Copilot` (copilot-swe-agent[bot])

The Go management SDK is **auto-generated** from API specifications. Manual edits to these files will be lost on the next regeneration and **must be reverted** before this PR can merge.

- If the generated code is wrong (e.g., the compilation error with a misreferenced parameter), please report an issue at [autorest.go](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.go/issues) or [azure-sdk-for-go codegen](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.go).
- If the API shape needs to change, update the spec in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs) and regenerate.

**Action required:** revert the manual change to the generated file above, then fix the root cause in the code generator or spec so the regenerated output compiles correctly.

---

## CI Status

All `go - pullrequest` CI checks passed ✅. Once the generated-file issue is resolved and reviewer approvals are obtained, this PR will be ready to merge.
